name: Server Sync
description: Server Sync is a Jellyfin plugin that enables synchronization of media content between multiple Jellyfin servers. Supports parent-child relationships where children sync back to the parent, and peer-to-peer relationships for bi-directional synchronization.
overview: Synchronize media content between Jellyfin servers

versions.changelog:
## Improvements
- Replace all direct HttpClient usage with IHttpClientFactory to prevent socket exhaustion and memory leaks
- Introduce full dependency injection across all tasks and controllers, removing Plugin.Instance singleton dependencies
- Add proper disposal of all HttpResponseMessage objects via ResponseDisposingStream pattern
- Add CancellationToken support to TestConnection, Authenticate, and GetMetadataItemImageInfo API endpoints
- Reuse SqliteCommand objects in batch database operations instead of recreating per iteration
- Use thread-safe double-checked locking for lazy SyncDatabase and JellyfinApiClient initialization
- Replace Parallel.ForEachAsync with bounded concurrency in place of unbounded Task.WhenAll+Select
- Add SSRF protection with URL and IP validation on source server connection endpoints
- Suppress internal exception details from API error responses to prevent information leakage
- Split SyncDatabase into partial classes by sync module (ContentSync, HistorySync, UserSync, MetadataSync)
- Split ConfigurationController into partial classes by sync module (Configuration, ContentSync, HistorySync, UserSync, MetadataSync)
- Extract shared paginated fetch/retry logic into PaginatedFetchUtility, eliminating duplication across 3 table services
- Consolidate duplicate connection test models (TestConnectionResponse merged into ConnectionTestResult)
- Consolidate duplicate authentication models (TokenAuthenticationResult merged into AuthenticateResponse)
- Extract ComputeOverallStatus helper to replace duplicated status-aggregation logic in user sync mapping

## Fixes
- Fix SQL ORDER BY MIN() without GROUP BY causing incorrect user sync pagination
- Fix HistorySyncItem.HasChanges not detecting MergedLastPlayedDate changes
- Fix SyncStatusResponse.Total double-counting the Deleting status
- Fix BaseSyncStatus enum mapping bug where Ignored (4) was incorrectly mapped as Synced (2)
- Fix UTC/Local datetime mismatch in recycling bin timestamp parsing
- Fix integer overflow in stream speed-limiting delay calculation
- Fix OverallStatus returning Ignored for empty item lists due to vacuous truth in LINQ All()
- Fix GetPendingSizes returning negative Total values
- Fix temp file leak in UserSyncStateService using incorrect Path.GetTempFileName pattern
- Fix stale dictionary entries in History and Metadata sync table services
- Fix CircuitBreaker half-open state check incorrectly requiring null _circuitOpenedAt
- Fix DiskSpaceService returning false-on-error instead of properly handling IOException
- Replace bare catch blocks with specific exception types across 5 service files
- Add InvariantCulture and RoundtripKind to all database datetime parsing
- Remove dead DownloadAndSaveImageAsync method and unused BeginTransaction from SyncDatabase
- Fix RetryPolicy retrying non-transient IOException subtypes (FileNotFoundException, DirectoryNotFoundException)

## New
- Enable Server Sync in the admin dashboard sidebar (EnableInMainMenu) for quick access alongside other server management pages
- Add library-level ignored paths to skip entire folders from Content, Metadata, and History sync
- Add wildcard support for ignored paths (e.g., Star Wars* matches all folders starting with that prefix)

## Improvements
- Move database reset controls from sync tabs to Settings > Troubleshooting > Database for centralized management
- Add individual table resets (Content, History, Metadata, User) alongside full database reset
- Use native Jellyfin fonts and CSS for Troubleshooting section styling consistency
- Modal change summary badges wrap to multiple rows on narrow/mobile screens

## Fixes
- Fix pagination breaking when switching between sync tabs without refreshing the page
- Fix queued/errored items not transitioning to synced when local file appears on subsequent refresh

## New
- Consolidate 4 sync pages (Content, History, Metadata, Users) into a unified Sync tab with a dropdown selector
- Extract shared JS utilities and PaginatedTable into serversync_shared.js, reducing ~4,700 lines of duplication
- Extract shared CSS into serversync_shared.css for consistent styling across all sync views
- Add Sync Type dropdown that dynamically shows only enabled sync types based on Settings configuration
- Add styled empty state with icon and Settings link when no sync types are enabled
- Add async file move utility to avoid blocking thread pool threads during downloads
- Add ResponseDisposingStream to ensure HTTP connections are released when download streams are closed

## Improvements
- Replace scroll-event-based pagination with IntersectionObserver for reliable infinite scroll in all containers
- Fix task polling race condition where completion was detected before the task started running
- Remove debug console.log statements from shared, sync, and settings modules
- Eliminate duplicate getDisplayStatus and getStatusClass functions in sync page table options
- Replace duplicate utility functions in settings page with shared module imports
- Use standard Jellyfin dropdown styling for Sync Type selector with proper chevron arrow
- Dynamic page title updates to reflect selected sync type
- Consolidate hardcoded CSS colors to use CSS custom properties (--status-queued-color, --status-synced-color, etc.)
- Extract repeated monospace font-family to --font-mono CSS variable
- Extract border color to --border-subtle CSS variable for consistent theming
- Remove redundant .syncView.hidden and .button-submit CSS rules
- Add aria-label=Close to all modal close buttons for accessibility
- Add consistent inline comments to all JS methods across all 4 sync table modules
- Reuse single HttpClient for image downloads across all metadata items (prevents socket exhaustion)
- Convert SyncHistoryItem from fake-async Task<bool> to synchronous bool (eliminates Task.FromResult allocations)
- Cache FileNameSanitizer invalid character HashSet and underscore-collapse regex as static fields
- Eliminate reentrant lock acquisition in CircuitBreaker.AllowOperation

## Fixes
- Resolve CodeQL alerts for log entries created from user input by breaking taint chain with local variables
- Fix useless assignment in SourceServerClient authentication error handling
- Fix constant condition in HistorySyncMergeService merge logic
- Fix missing Dispose on StringContent in SourceServerClient authentication
- Harden all database read operations with error handling and safe fallbacks for transient SQLite errors
- Add disposed-state guards to all SyncDatabase public methods to prevent use-after-dispose crashes
- Fix connection leak in database reconnection when pragma execution fails
- Fix race condition in database disposal
- Fix JsonDocument memory leak in SourceServerClient.AuthenticateAsync (pooled ArrayPool buffers not returned)
- Fix HttpResponseMessage leak on companion file download fallback path (socket exhaustion)
- Fix HttpResponseMessage leak in DownloadFileAsync and DownloadCompanionFileAsync (callers now auto-dispose)
- Fix thread-unsafe database reads where EnsureConnection could replace connection mid-read
- Fix culture-dependent DateTime.Parse in SyncDatabase, SyncMissingMetadataTask, and JsonComparisonUtility
- Fix potential integer overflow in RetryPolicy exponential backoff calculation
- Fix NullReferenceException on UserMappings in SyncMissingUserDataTask and RefreshUserSyncTableTask
- Fix FormatException crash on invalid library GUID in RefreshContentSyncTableTask (now skips with warning)
- Fix non-thread-safe static CircuitBreaker initialization with double-checked locking
- Add missing .catch() handlers on all PageController loadConfig promise chains in sync page JS

## Improvements
- Harden all database read operations with error handling and safe fallbacks for transient SQLite errors
- Add disposed-state guards to all SyncDatabase public methods to prevent use-after-dispose crashes
- Fix connection leak in database reconnection when pragma execution fails
- Fix race condition in database disposal

## Fixes
- Resolve CodeQL alerts for log entries created from user input by breaking taint chain with local variables
- Fix useless assignment in SourceServerClient authentication error handling
- Fix constant condition in HistorySyncMergeService merge logic
- Fix missing Dispose on StringContent in SourceServerClient authentication

## Fixes
- Fix database reset operations for metadata, history, and user sync tables failing with readonly database errors by falling back to full database recreation

## Features
- Add Metadata Refresh Mode setting (Full Refresh / Skip Unchanged) for ETag-based change detection to skip unmodified items during metadata sync

## Improvements
- Add real-time progress percentage and progress bar to Refresh and Sync buttons across all sync pages
- Replace bulk action text buttons with Material Icons across all sync tables for better mobile layout
- Standardize empty table messages across all four sync pages
- Add Provider IDs display to the metadata sync comparison modal

## Fixes
- Fix false-positive metadata change detection caused by ProviderIds serialization mismatch between source and local servers

## Fixes
- Fix people changes falsely detected due to ordering differences

## Improvements
- Add default triggers for refresh sync table tasks (2 hours before sync tasks)

## Improvements
- Remove syncs also performing refreshes

## Improvements
- Hightlight changes in the history modal

## Fixes
- Highlight images in metadata modal on change

## New
- Token generation from username & password as alternative to API Key

## Improvements
- Client now registers with local server name and plugin version
- Consolidated server info display (Server, ID, User)

## Fixes
- Connection test now validates API key/token properly

## New
- Metadata Genre Syncing
- Metadata People Syncing
- Metadata Studio Syncing
- Metadata Tag Syncing

## Improvements
- Order Sync Tables by status > name
- Setting to delete empty folders on deletion

## Fixes
- Negotiated history was treating True > False instead of negotiating
- Changing local information was picked up as a change but not queued
- Fix Github Action bundling for new web files | Unconfirmed

## New
- User Sync feature for syncing user policies, configuration, and profile images between servers
- Per-property sync records (Policy, Configuration, ProfileImage) for granular control
- SHA256 hash-based comparison for accurate profile image change detection
- Library ID translation for policy sync (EnabledFolders, BlockedMediaFolders)
- Semantic JSON comparison for detecting policy and configuration changes
- User mappings configuration to link source users to local users
- Individual toggles for syncing Policy, Configuration, and Profile Image
- Metadata syncing

## Improvements
- Complete web rework to utilize exisitng tabs and split out the configPage into multiple files
- Web cleanup & centralization of shared components
- Reorganize web files
- Consolidated duplicate FormatBytes and ComputeHash utilities
- Added HashUtilities for shared SHA256 hash computation

## Fixes
- Fix CSS inconsistencies
- Fix profile image sync entity state management

## Improvements
- Replace page navigation with infinite scroll for better UX
- Add reload button to table header row
- Fix mobile tap handling for opening item modals

## Improvements
- Add server-side pagination to sync table for better performance on large libraries
- Create reusable PaginatedTable component for future user/history sync features

## Fixes
- Remove hardcoded version from csproj to match episodepostergenerator pattern

## Fixes
- Fix AssemblyVersion to match build.yaml version

## Fixes
- Fix build.sh to include all dependency DLLs in release package

## Fixes
- Package all dependencies
- Rebuild attempt
- Version bump

## Fixes
- Package all dependencies
- Increment correctly

## Features
- One-way media sync from source Jellyfin server using API key authentication
- Library mapping with automatic path translation between source and local servers
- ETag-based change detection for identifying updated content
- Granular approval modes (Enabled/RequireApproval/Disabled) for new content, replacements, and deletions
- Recycling bin for soft-deleting replaced or removed files with configurable retention period
- Bandwidth throttling with configurable speed limits (KB/s, MB/s, GB/s)
- Time-based bandwidth scheduling for off-peak unlimited downloads
- Concurrent downloads with configurable limit (1-10 simultaneous)
- Minimum free disk space protection to prevent disk exhaustion
- Per-file disk space validation before each download
- Companion file support for external subtitles, NFO files, and images
- Automatic retry for failed downloads with configurable max attempts
- Circuit breaker pattern to prevent hammering failed source servers
- Web UI for managing sync items with search, filtering, and bulk actions
- Health dashboard showing sync status, disk space, and last sync time
- Database reset capability for fresh sync state
